changes.summary: Typed collaborative-document section/block snapshots on the port boundary (DocumentSectionSnapshot, DocumentBlockSnapshot, DocumentBlockEditHistoryEntry); MeriterDocumentSnapshot.sections and section persistence methods now use structured types instead of unknown[].
Deep-clone sections, blocks, and editHistory when mapping MeriterDocumentSnapshot to persistence shape.
Deep-clone poll options and metrics when mapping PollSnapshot to persistence shape.

verification.tsc: no errors on poll/document/event/notification persistence paths (pre-existing TS5101 baseUrl deprecation only)

notes: Attempt 3 strengthens write_set port/mapper contracts: BC-06 document sections are structurally typed on DocumentPersistencePort; document and poll mappers deep-clone nested aggregates on write. Poll/document/event/notification ports unchanged in operation surface; target seven services remain port-backed from attempt 1 wiring (outside write_set). Dag success_criteria (global no @InjectModel in domain/services/**, closes_waiver V-12) remain unmet: 27 other domain service files still use @InjectModel including deferred Publication/Community cross-reads and collaborative-documents-migration MeriterDocument access.
